system: single ideal mass-spring oscillator near equilibrium

practical: linear displacement sensor, camera tracking, or encoder measuring x

regime_assumptions: coordinate x is measured from static equilibrium
damping and drive are outside this static stiffness card
coordinate_note: Single homogeneous displacement coordinate; the Hessian entry is directly interpretable as stiffness.

module_object.description: stiffness Hessian of the potential energy in coordinate x

derivation_status: exact from the stated ideal spring equation

ceiling_or_reference.description: no hidden coordinate is declared in this card

positive_scope: This card exposes physical stiffness as a direct one-dimensional quadratic module object.
boundary: It does not describe nonlinear springs, damping, driving, or measurement noise.
failure_mode: The attachment fails if the force-displacement law is not linear over the operating range.
next_measurement: Measure displacement and force over a small range to estimate k.
